rows.description:

Immediate Rental Income | Great for Investment or Own Stay

💰 Selling Price: RM240,000 (Negotiable for serious buyers)
🏡 Property Type: Townhouse (Upper & Lower Floor)
🛏 Bedrooms: 3
🛁 Bathrooms: 2
📜 Tenure: Freehold

*Whatsapp Mrs Lim +65 8118 3682*

Smart Investment Opportunity in Growing Masai

Looking for an affordable property with immediate returns? This 3-bedroom townhouse at Summerpark, Masai comes with an existing tenant, allowing you to enjoy instant rental income from Day 1 — a hassle-free investment opportunity with steady cash flow potential.

Perfect for:
✔ Investors seeking stable rental yield
✔ First-time home buyers entering the property market
✔ Small families looking for affordable freehold living

✨ Unique Townhouse Concept
